extraction.one_line_summary: FUGLSANG attacked long-range on the final 17km climb to Cabeza de Cabres, held off GEOGHEGAN HART by 22 seconds for a solo victory.
tactical_patterns: BOUCHARD attacked too early on first climb for KOM points, allowing MADRAZO to conserve energy and close gap strategically.
MAJKA waited for VALVERDE instead of chasing LÓPEZ/POGAČAR, revealing Movistar prioritizes defending podium over attacking.
LÓPEZ and POGAČAR cooperation dropped VALVERDE together, showing young rivals will collaborate against established GC threats before fighting each other.
FUGLSANG went long-range solo 17km from finish despite yesterday's third place, exploiting breakaway momentum rather than waiting for group tactics.

rider_signals.FUGLSANG Jakob: positive: secured solo mountaintop win with 17km solo effort, confirming 2019 form extends beyond spring classics.
rider_signals.GEOGHEGAN HART Tao: positive: chased FUGLSANG alone in final km, finishing second after previous day's third place shows sustained climbing form.
rider_signals.MADRAZO Ángel: positive: tactical discipline on first KOM prevented BOUCHARD from extending points gap by not chasing premature attack.
rider_signals.LÓPEZ Miguel Ángel: positive: actively attacked race leader ROGLIČ on final climb, collaborating with POGAČAR to apply pressure despite GC rivalry.
rider_signals.POGAČAR Tadej: positive: worked with LÓPEZ to distance VALVERDE, showing willingness to spend energy attacking established podium positions.
rider_signals.VALVERDE Alejandro: negative: dropped by LÓPEZ/POGAČAR collaboration, lost 21 seconds and looks vulnerable when isolated from MOVISTAR teammates.
rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: neutral: appeared shaky when isolated but limited losses to 21 seconds, defended red jersey without teammates on final climb.
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: negative: dropped to sixth overall after losing time, slipping behind MAJKA who waited for VALVERDE instead of chasing.
